title: helipterum cotula
intro: Helipterum cotula, also known as Billygoat's Beard, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Helipterum cotula is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are also used in topical creams and ointments to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
